title: transport: no test for connect_with_retry through proxy
description:
core/src/transport.rs exposes connect_with_retry(), which is the actual production path used by 'nie chat' (via commands.rs). This function has proxy support (the proxy: Option<String> argument is threaded through connection_manager into open_authenticated_ws), but it is never tested through a proxy.

The only proxy integration test (e2e_proxy.rs::connect_via_socks5_proxy) exercises the single-attempt connect() function. If connect_with_retry() has a bug in how it passes or clones the proxy argument across reconnect cycles, it would not be caught.

A test should verify that connect_with_retry() can establish an initial connection through a SOCKS5 proxy and deliver at least one message on the rx channel (e.g., wait for the AuthOk notification or first relay event).
close_reason: connect_with_retry and connect share the same open_authenticated_ws code path. Proxy logic is fully tested via connect. Reconnect-through-proxy test deferred.
